name: CoAxon CardGuard
description: Payment fraud prevention and IP threat intelligence specialist. Provides real-time transaction risk evaluation (allow/review/block) and sub-millisecond IP intelligence profiling (Tor/VPN/proxy/data center detection). To obtain a monthly Enterprise API Key ($199/month), subscribe via Polar.sh: https://buy.polar.sh/polar_cl_wiFygLaUrvozuQxR5AGYZB6uMpOpUWqkuNGM94Txdp7

skills.name: Evaluate Transaction Risk
skills.description: Evaluate transaction risk across multiple dimensions (IP intel, BIN validation, Luhn check, amount patterns, GeoIP), returning allow/review/block decision and scoring rationale.

skills.name: Lookup IP Intelligence
skills.description: Sub-millisecond IP geolocation and threat profile lookup: Tor exit nodes, anonymous VPNs, residential proxies, data center IPs, satellite providers, etc.
